name: kimi-k3-collab
description: Collaborate with persistent Kimi K3 through its direct live interface inside Codex.

interface.shortDescription: See and talk with Kimi K3 directly inside Codex.
interface.longDescription: Starts persistent Kimi K3 engineering and design sessions, streams authentic Markdown and tool activity into a Codex MCP App, and supports direct follow-up messages without status polling or a forwarding subagent.
interface.defaultPrompt: Start a direct Kimi K3 collaboration for an independent engineering or visual-design review.
